recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure

recommendations.title: Cro Minion
recommendations.overview: Two minions have to babysit a little Neanderthal baby.

recommendations.title: Despicable Me 3
recommendations.overview: Gru and his wife Lucy must stop former '80s child star Balthazar Bratt from achieving world domination.

recommendations.title: Minions
recommendations.overview: Minions Stuart, Kevin and Bob are recruited by Scarlet Overkill, a super-villain who, alongside her inventor husband Herb, hatches a plot to take over the world.

recommendations.title: Competition
recommendations.overview: Two minions working in a bomb lab get competitive.

recommendations.title: No Time for Nuts
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Scrat comes across a time machine and is transported to various times all in pursuit of his beloved acorn.

recommendations.title: The Lorax
recommendations.overview: A 12-year-old boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. To find it he must discover the story of the Lorax, the grumpy yet charming creature who fights to protect his world.

recommendations.title: The Secret Life of Pets
recommendations.overview: The quiet life of a terrier named Max is upended when his owner takes in Duke, a stray whom Max instantly dislikes.
